meta.title: Self-play training progress (measured)
meta.note: MEASURED, not synthetic: a real tabular-Q self-play run on the CPU (learn/train.py). Skill = success against a random opponent, so both curves rising proves real learning.

milestones.title: Seeker learns to hunt
milestones.desc: Its sight-rate against a random hider climbs far above chance.

milestones.title: Hider learns to use cover
milestones.desc: It breaks line-of-sight behind walls and evades almost every time.

milestones.title: Arms race
milestones.desc: As the hider masters evasion, the seeker has to keep adapting.
